name: Tutorial: verify-android-silent_auth
postCreateCommand: mkdir -p .vscode && echo '{"version":"2.0.0","tasks":[{"label":"PassThrough","type":"shell","command":"echo \"Tutorial initialization listening hook active...\"","isBackground":true,"runOptions":{"runOn":"folderOpen"}}]}' > .vscode/tasks.json && echo '{"version":"0.2.0","configurations":[{"type":"node","request":"launch","name":"Auto Open Tutorial","preLaunchTask":"PassThrough","serverReadyAction":{"pattern":"APPLICATION READY","action":"runCommand","command":"livePreview.start"}}]}' > .vscode/launch.json
postAttachCommand:
code --command livePreview.start && nohup ./node_modules/.bin/http-server steps -p 1234 --cors -c-1 > /dev/null 2>&1 & cd project && (sleep 4 && echo -e '

🚀 APPLICATION READY:
https://${CODESPACE_NAME}-3000.app.github.dev

' &) && (nohup sh -c 'sleep 5 && gh codespace ports visibility 3000:public -c $CODESPACE_NAME' > /dev/null 2>&1 &) && npm start

code --command livePreview.start && cd project && (sleep 4 && echo -e '

🚀 APPLICATION READY:
https://${CODESPACE_NAME}-3000.app.github.dev

' &) && (nohup sh -c 'sleep 5 && gh codespace ports visibility 3000:public -c $CODESPACE_NAME' > /dev/null 2>&1 &) && npm start

code --extension ms-vscode.live-server && nohup node -e "const http = require('http'), fs = require('fs'), path = require('path'); http.createServer((req, res) => { res.setHeader('X-Frame-Options', 'ALLOWALL'); res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*'); let f = path.join('steps', req.url === '/' ? 'index.html' : req.url); fs.readFile(f, (err, data) => { if (err) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not Found'); } else { res.end(data); } }); }).listen(1234);" > /dev/null 2>&1 & cd project && (sleep 4 && echo -e '

🚀 APPLICATION READY:
https://${CODESPACE_NAME}-3000.app.github.dev

' &) && (nohup sh -c 'sleep 5 && gh codespace ports visibility 3000:public -c $CODESPACE_NAME' > /dev/null 2>&1 &) && npm start

cd project && (sleep 4 && echo -e '

🚀 APPLICATION READY:
https://${CODESPACE_NAME}-3000.app.github.dev

' &) && (nohup sh -c 'sleep 5 && gh codespace ports visibility 3000:public -c $CODESPACE_NAME' > /dev/null 2>&1 &) && npm start

(sleep 5 && node -e "const cp = require('child_process'); cp.exec('mkdir -p .vscode && echo "{\"version\":\"2.0.0\",\"tasks\":[{\"label\":\"LivePreview\",\"type\":\"shell\",\"command\":\"echo Workspace Canvas Ready\",\"runOptions\":{\"runOn\":\"folderOpen\"},\"serverReadyAction\":{\"pattern\":\"Ready\",\"action\":\"runCommand\",\"command\":\"livePreview.start\"}}]}\" > .vscode/tasks.json');" &) && cd project && (sleep 4 && echo -e '

🚀 APPLICATION READY:
https://${CODESPACE_NAME}-3000.app.github.dev

' &) && (nohup sh -c 'sleep 5 && gh codespace ports visibility 3000:public -c $CODESPACE_NAME' > /dev/null 2>&1 &) && npm start

cd project && (sleep 4 && echo -e '

🚀 APPLICATION READY:
https://${CODESPACE_NAME}-3000.app.github.dev

' &) && (nohup sh -c 'sleep 5 && gh codespace ports visibility 3000:public -c $CODESPACE_NAME' > /dev/null 2>&1 &) && npm start
